sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id BIGINT, timestamp_col TIMESTAMP, value DOUBLE, partition_col VARCHAR);
SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY partition_col ORDER BY timestamp_col) - row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY partition_col ORDER BY value) AS row_diff FROM test_table;

SELECT partition_col, SUM(value) AS total_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY partition_col ORDER BY value) AS row_num FROM test_table GROUP BY partition_col HAVING total_value > 15;

SELECT a.id, a.value, (row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY a.partition_col ORDER BY a.timestamp_col) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS adjusted_row_num FROM test_table a JOIN (SELECT MIN(value) AS min_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY partition_col) b ON a.value > b.min_value;
SELECT value, (row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY partition_col ORDER BY timestamp_col) * INTERVAL 2 HOUR) AS time_adjust FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND timestamp_col IS NOT NULL;

WITH temp AS (SELECT partition_col, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM test_table GROUP BY partition_col) SELECT temp.partition_col, temp.cnt - row_number() OVER (ORDER BY temp.cnt) AS difference FROM temp WHERE cnt > 2;
CREATE TABLE another_table (section_id INT, created_at TIMESTAMP, score DECIMAL(10,2));

SELECT nt.section_id, nt.score, (row_number() OVER (ORDER BY nt.created_at) - row_number() OVER (ORDER BY nt.score)) AS scoring_diff FROM another_table nt JOIN test_table tt ON nt.section_id = tt.id WHERE nt.score IS NOT NULL;

SELECT tt.id, tt.value, nt.score, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY nt.section_id ORDER BY nt.created_at) AS section_row_num, (timestamp_col - INTERVAL (row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY tt.partition_col ORDER BY tt.timestamp_col) + 1) HOUR) AS adjusted_time FROM test_table tt LEFT JOIN another_table nt ON tt.id = nt.section_id WHERE nt.created_at < NOW();
